ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the smuggler's opportunistic nature but could be more natural in tone. Overall quality is good as it stays within character and situation constraints.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response lacks context relevance, aligns well with persona consistency but could improve naturalness in tone to better fit the smuggler's character and situation.
"Response is consistent with persona but lacks context relevance and naturalness."
